title: Terms and Conditions
content:
## Terms & Conditions for SMS Communications
Brown Immigration Law Effective Date : October 20, 2025

## 1. Consent to Receive Messages
By providing your mobile number, you consent to receive text messages from Brown Immigration Law related to appointment reminders, case status updates, consultation scheduling, etc.
Message and data rates may apply.

## 2. Message Frequency
Message frequency will vary based on your activity, case type, and communication preferences.
You may opt out of receiving text messages at any time by contacting your legal team directly.
After opting out, you may still receive non-marketing messages related to active legal matters as permitted by law.
For assistance, reply HELP or contact us at immigration@brownimmlaw.com .
Your privacy is important to us. Please review our Privacy Notice to understand how we protect your information.

## 6. Supported Carriers
Message delivery is subject to your mobile carrier’s availability and network coverage. Brown Immigration Law is not liable for delayed or undelivered messages.

## 7. Changes to These Terms
We may update these Terms periodically. Continued participation in our SMS program after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

## 8. Contact Information
For questions about these Terms or our messaging practices:
Brown Immigration Law
https://www.brown-immigration.com/
Email: info@brown-immigration.com
Phone: [888.861.4414]
